title: Implement Live Companion and Visual Truth vertical slice
goal: Implement provider-reference drift auditing, a receipt-bound companion release and HTTPS doctor, authenticated visual capture receipts and three Golden Board reference compositions in Schauwerk.

approval.note: The user explicitly authorized implementation and the public HTTPS/Miro Developer App path. Repository merge still requires a complete diff, green CI and diff-bound review. Provider mutations may target only exact allowlisted test resources and require readback.

acceptance.assertion: The capability audit reports observed live tools, official-reference tools, live/reference differences and adapter coverage as separate evidence layers.
acceptance.verifier: tests, live audit fixture and merged implementation

acceptance.assertion: A deterministic release manifest binds a verified companion build to an HTTPS app URL, expected scopes and non-secret Developer App identity, and a doctor validates deployed content and security headers fail-closed.

An authenticated provider capture is validated and receipt-bound to an exact repeatable board snapshot, image digest, dimensions and explicit authentication evidence; unauthenticated pages cannot pass.
Three intentionally distinct reference compositions cover system landscape, decision flow and narrative journey and pass deterministic quality and preview checks.
acceptance.verifier: fixtures, package checks and regression tests

acceptance.assertion: Public hosting, Developer App registration, team installation and authorization are verified by live readback or remain explicitly open without being inferred from local builds or MCP OAuth.
acceptance.verifier: deployment receipt or explicit blocked-gate receipt

acceptance.assertion: Tests, CI, full downloadable diff, head- and diff-bound review, mergeability and post-merge validation pass before verification.

implementation_evidence.post_merge_validation: 711 tests plus Ruff, compileall and registry validation passed on f2a8c8281a3e01fff2dc6f9ad057d58ad45a28f8

deployment_closeout.ci: Six required GitHub checks succeeded at the exact reviewed head.
deployment_closeout.local_validation: Full project test suite, Ruff and compileall passed in the project virtual environment.

satisfied_acceptance.companion-release: The deterministic nine-file build digest 7ffbe6210037e17886471f648e2fefaf853815cf4c2de18fef2e43b7ff8313db is served byte-identically from the repository-owned HTTPS URL. The release doctor remains fail-closed: GitHub Pages does not emit the required CSP, frame, permissions, referrer or nosniff headers.
satisfied_acceptance.golden-boards: Three distinct system-landscape, decision-flow and narrative-journey compositions compile and preview with zero blockers.
satisfied_acceptance.merge-gates: PR #100 was merged only after exact base/head/diff revalidation, two bound PASS reviews, six green checks and local validation. Independent readback confirms merge commit a4aca3e22e2cb58f484e428901051309e65522c1 contains the exact reviewed head.
satisfied_acceptance.provider-drift: Merged and live-read: 33 observed tools, three documented tools absent live and five live tools absent from the reference; the live catalogue remains operational authority.
satisfied_acceptance.visual-truth: An authenticated 1912x995 Miro capture was bound to the twice-identical sanitized snapshot dbfc336f44858ed6c8ae7fb3a1ce673a2b60740a103b95bc7e98a056e1832720 and independently checked as receipt 4d0dc02f92f3509db44666d581f1564f0ab7caa342c268548ef2d77f740de890.
satisfied_acceptance.live-gates: GitHub Pages is live and HTTPS-enforced; the Developer App is saved with only boards:read, installed in Dev team and loaded as both launcher and panel frames in an authenticated Miro board. Direct Web SDK calls getInfo, getSelection and frame readback succeeded with no SDK error.

metadata.outcome: Schauwerk PR #100 is merged at the exact reviewed head. GitHub Pages serves the deterministic companion bundle over enforced HTTPS. The Miro Developer App is saved with only boards:read, installed in Dev team, loaded inside an authenticated isolated board and read back through the Web SDK.

resolved_blockers.resolution: GitHub Pages was enabled in workflow mode at https://heimgewebe.github.io/schauwerk/. The exact deployed bundle is public, durable under repository ownership, HTTPS-enforced and byte-identical to the deterministic build. Header hardening remains a separate optimization.
An authenticated Developer team and Schauwerk Companion app now exist. The app was configured with only boards:read, installed into Dev team and opened inside an authenticated isolated board.

historical_blockers.evidence: The exact companion bundle was deployed to an anonymous Cloudflare Worker and passed the fail-closed HTTPS doctor for all eight release files and required headers. The deployment is a time-limited temporary preview, remains unclaimed, and no approved durable hosting credential is available.
historical_blockers.required_resolution: Claim or redeploy the exact release on an approved durable HTTPS host, preserve html_handling=none and the required headers, then rerun the receipt-bound HTTPS doctor.

historical_blockers.evidence: The scoped Education profile is authenticated and the Developer Apps dashboard is accessible. Creating the first Developer team requires a checkbox attesting authority to accept Miro Developer Terms, Terms of Service and Privacy Policy on behalf of the organization. No such attestation was made by the agent.
historical_blockers.required_resolution: An authorized human must accept the Miro Developer terms. Then create Schauwerk Companion, configure only boards:read with the verified HTTPS app URL, install it into the Developer team and verify the in-board readback.
